---
name: Question / Help
about: Something isn't working and you're not sure if it's a bug or a usage issue
title: "question: "
labels: "question"
assignees: ""
---

## Before Opening This Issue

- [ ] I read the [README](https://github.com/shalomb/inji#readme)
- [ ] I searched [existing issues](https://github.com/shalomb/inji/issues)
- [ ] I tried with the latest release (`pip install --upgrade inji`)

---

## What are you trying to do?

> Describe your goal — what template / command / workflow you're working on.

## What have you tried?

```bash
# template
$ cat template.j2

# command
$ inji ...

# output / error
```

## Versions

- **inji version**: `inji --version`
- **Python version**: `python3 --version`
- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]

## Additional Context

> Anything else that might help — logs, config files, screenshots.
